channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇦🇪🇮🇱 UAE Denies Netanyahu's Claim of Secret Visit During Iran War
item.description: Israeli PM Netanyahu said he secretly met UAE's president during the Iran war, but the UAE Foreign Ministry called the claims "entirely unfounded." Iran warned Gulf states against collusion with Israel.

item.title: 🛢️📈 IEA Warns Oil Market Turmoil Far From Over as Inventories Deplete
item.description: The International Energy Agency says global oil supply dropped 1.8 million b/d in April, with total losses at 12.8 million b/d since the Iran war began. Brent crude near $107/barrel as inventories deplete at "record pace."

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump-Xi Summit Underway in Beijing With Trade, Taiwan, Iran on Agenda
item.description: President Trump arrived in Beijing for a high-stakes two-day summit with President Xi Jinping. Trade, Taiwan, and the Iran war are key agenda items as the leaders seek to manage growing tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Russia Launches 800-Drone Barrage on Ukraine in One of War's Longest Attacks
item.description: Russia fired over 800 drones across 20 Ukrainian regions in a massive daytime attack that lasted hours. At least six people were killed. Poland scrambled fighter jets as the attack triggered air alerts across Ukraine.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇦🇪 Netanyahu Claims Secret UAE Visit; UAE Denies Any Meeting Took Place
item.description: Netanyahu's office said he secretly visited the UAE and met its president during the Iran war, calling it a "historic breakthrough." The UAE denied the visit happened, stating relations with Israel are conducted through official Abraham Accords channels only.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu makes secret visit to UAE during Iran war
item.description: Israeli PM secretly visited UAE during the Iran conflict, his office confirmed. Tehran slammed the visit as "collusion" as diplomatic efforts continue over Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Explosions rock Kyiv as daytime drone strike escalates to missile attack
item.description: Russian forces launched a mass daytime drone attack on Kyiv that escalated into a large-scale missile strike, marking an escalation in tactics against the Ukrainian capital.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House unanimously passes resolution urging Trump to press Xi on China detainees
item.description: The House voted unanimously to urge President Trump to raise the issue of American detainees in China during his meeting with President Xi.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing: Iran War and Trade Top Agenda
item.description: President Trump meets Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing for high-stakes talks on the Iran conflict and trade relations. Trump says he does not need China's help on Iran, but analysts say Beijing's cooperation is critical for any diplomatic resolution.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Kremlin: Russia can do business with US if it stops linking trade to Ukraine
item.description: Kremlin spokesperson Dmitry Peskov said Russia is open to business ties with the US if Washington decouples trade from Ukraine-related sanctions, signaling potential for limited economic engagement.

item.title: 🇮🇳 Iran War Casts Shadow Over BRICS Foreign Ministers Meeting in Delhi
item.description: BRICS foreign ministers gathered in Delhi as the Iran war dominated discussions. Iran's foreign minister attended amid tensions over the Strait of Hormuz blockade and regional security concerns.

item.title: 💰 ECB Official: Global Oil Shock May Require Rate Hikes
item.description: ECB chief economist Philip Lane warned that the oil price shock from the Iran war could force the European Central Bank to raise interest rates, adding inflationary pressure to already strained economies.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Releases Prominent Rights Lawyer Nasrin Sotoudeh on Bail
item.description: Iran released prominent human rights lawyer Nasrin Sotoudeh on bail more than a month after her detention. Sotoudeh is known for defending activists and women prosecuted for removing headscarves.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Russia Places UK Ex-Defense Minister Ben Wallace on Wanted List
item.description: Russia placed former UK Defense Secretary Ben Wallace on its wanted list, escalating tensions with Britain over Ukraine support. Wallace was a key figure in coordinating Western military aid to Kyiv.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇦🇲 Turkey and Armenia Move Closer to Direct Trade Links
item.description: Turkey and Armenia signed agreements moving toward direct trade links, signaling a warming in relations between the historic rivals. Energy infrastructure and regional transit routes are central to the new cooperation.

item.title: 💰 US Producer Prices Post Biggest Gain in Four Years
item.description: US producer prices rose sharply in April, posting the biggest gain in four years as energy costs surged amid the Iran war's impact on global oil markets.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary Summons Russian Ambassador Over Drone Strikes in Western Ukraine
item.description: Hungary summoned Russia's ambassador after drone strikes hit western Ukraine near the Hungarian border. PM Orbán, a skeptic of Western Ukraine policy, faced pressure as attacks reached neighboring Zakarpattia.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Forces Ordered to Behead Ukrainian Soldiers, General Staff Reports
item.description: Ukraine's General Staff reported that Russian forces were ordered to behead and display the bodies of two fallen Ukrainian soldiers, marking an escalation in battlefield atrocities.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Hungary PM to Summon Russian Ambassador After Unprecedented Attack on Zakarpattia
item.description: After an unprecedented Russian attack on Ukraine's Zakarpattia region near the Hungarian border, Hungary's PM said he would summon Russia's ambassador in response.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Army Abruptly Cancels Deployment of 4,000 Soldiers to Poland
item.description: The US Army abruptly canceled a planned deployment of 4,000 soldiers to Poland, raising questions about US military commitments in Eastern Europe amid the ongoing Ukraine conflict.

item.title: ✈️ US Air Force MQ-9 Fleet Drops to 135 Aircraft After Iran Combat Losses
item.description: The US Air Force's MQ-9 Reaper drone fleet has dropped to 135 aircraft following combat losses in the Iran conflict, highlighting the toll of sustained operations in the Middle East.

item.title: ✈️ Austrian Jets Intercept Unauthorized US Military Planes Two Days in a Row
item.description: Austrian fighter jets intercepted unauthorized US military aircraft for the second consecutive day, highlighting tensions over military transit flights through neutral Austria's airspace.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskyy Warns of Incoming Russian Drone Attacks During Daylight
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy warned of unprecedented daytime Russian drone attacks, urging civilians to take shelter. The warning came as Russia launched hundreds of drones across multiple regions.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Nvidia CEO Joins Trump's Mission to Open Up China
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is part of the US business delegation accompanying Trump to China, highlighting technology companies' interests in maintaining access to Chinese markets despite geopolitical tensions.

item.title: 🏛️ US Senate Blocks Latest Bid to Rein in Trump's Iran War Powers
item.description: The US Senate blocked another attempt to limit Trump's war powers regarding Iran, though support for congressional oversight continues to grow amid the prolonged conflict.
